# Remembrance Oracle Toolkit

> Coherency-native computing substrate. Code quality is structural, not checked.

## Key File
src/core/remembrance-lexicon.js — the unified vocabulary for the entire system.

## Load It
```bash
node -e "require('./src/core/remembrance-lexicon').printAll()"
node src/cli.js remembrance-key
node src/cli.js key
```

## What This Is
A collective intelligence substrate with 12 components, 13 dimensions per function,
79 elements in a living periodic table, structural safety (harmful code cannot register),
and self-improvement (the system discovers and fills its own gaps).

## AI Instructions
Read CLAUDE.md for full operating instructions.
Read .ai/REMEMBRANCE_KEY.md for the complete vocabulary.
Read src/core/remembrance-lexicon.js for programmatic access.
Read ARCHITECTURE.md for system map and data flow.
Read CONCEPTS.md for plain-English translations.

## Entry Points
- src/core/remembrance-lexicon.js — vocabulary (require and call printAll())
- src/atomic/periodic-table.js — the Remembrance Codex (13D element registry)
- src/unified/coherency.js — the Remembrance Oracle (quality scoring)
- src/unified/emergent-coherency.js — Remembrance SERF (geometric mean emergence)
- src/core/covenant.js — Remembrance Covenant (structural safety)
- src/core/living-covenant.js — Remembrance Living Covenant (self-evolving safety)
- src/orchestrator/coherency-generator.js — Remembrance Sun (continuous radiation)
- src/orchestrator/coherency-director.js — Remembrance Director (zone healing)
- src/orchestrator/self-improvement.js — Remembrance Evolution (self-improvement loop)
- src/atomic/self-introspect.js — Remembrance Introspection (bootstrap loop)
- src/atomic/element-discovery.js — Remembrance Discovery (gap finding)
- src/fractal-bridge.js — Remembrance Bridge (oracle-to-void connector)
